headline: Extra Space Storage (EXR) Launches Guaranteed Senior Unsecured Notes Offering
summary: Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) has launched a new fixed-income offering of senior, unsecured notes with guarantees. The notes are callable, giving the company the option to redeem them before maturity. The transaction introduces a fresh debt instrument that could affect Extra Space Storage’s capital structure and funding mix. Extra Space Storage, a large self-storage operator in the US, already relies on a mix of equity and debt to support its property portfolio. The new offering of...
